shape_decode: cmp,vp,vpc,naive = L,_,W,L : value_profile_cmplog RESOLVES while cmplog AND naive BLOCK and value_profile is non-decisive. Single-technique vp-PRO: the decisive delta over cmplog is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient, and because plain value_profile is non-decisive the gradient operates only in conjunction with I2S via vpc.

hypotheses.label: vpc's CMP_MAP gradient ratchets the corpus byte-by-byte toward a CONCRETE literal token that cmplog's edge-only signal cannot bank near-miss progress toward

measurement.registry_tool_rationale: joint_necessity does NOT fit: it scores a joint-necessity ASSEMBLY-DEPTH subtype (vpc-needs-both) and reports vp_tags over a value_profile-BLOCKING seed set, but in this shape value_profile is NON-DECISIVE (`_`, no decisive vp-blocking arm) and the mechanism is single-technique vp-PRO toward a literal, not a structural joint. operand_enrichment (byte_freq_ratio) also does not fit: it is a fixed-offset byte presence/absence test, whereas this hypothesis needs graded HAMMING DISTANCE to a known literal across the W vs L seed sets. NEW descriptor.

metric_definitions.w_min_hamming_to_literal: over the vpc-RESOLVING (W) seed set, the median per-seed minimum Hamming distance between the gate-literal-width window scanned across the seed and operand_literal (normalized 0..1 by operand_width_bytes)
metric_definitions.l_min_hamming_to_literal: same statistic over the cmplog/naive-BLOCKING (L) seed set
metric_definitions.distance_gap: l_min_hamming_to_literal - w_min_hamming_to_literal (positive => W seeds sit closer to the literal than L seeds)

hypotheses.prediction: W seeds sit measurably CLOSER to the gate literal than L seeds (distance_gap > 0 AND w_min_hamming_to_literal low), because the CMP_MAP gradient preserved near-miss seeds inching toward the literal. This is DISCRIMINATING: the competing 'I2S substitution alone suffices' alternative predicts cmplog-BLOCKING seeds would be EQUALLY close (one splice from the literal, so distance_gap ~ 0) since both arms share the I2S mutator; observing a real gap rules that alternative out and confirms the gradient (not I2S) is what banks the progress.

hypotheses.label: vpc's CMP_MAP gradient accumulates partial credit across chained comparisons to drive the corpus to a structurally DEEPER parse state (multi-child content model / namespace binding / internal subset / pointer-identity) whose gate is a derived pointer/state check with NO fixed literal pre-image

measurement.registry_tool_rationale: joint_necessity is the nearest catalog tool (struct_size_and_token_count, assembly-depth subtype) but is keyed to a JOINT (vpc-needs-both) shape with a value_profile-blocking arm; here value_profile is non-decisive and the divergence is vp-PRO single-technique vs cmplog, so its vp_tags metric is undefined. value_distance_reached cannot apply because these gates have operand_literal=null / operand_kind=none_structural|derived_integer (a runtime-interned pointer or accumulated parse-depth state, NOT a byte-comparable literal) — there is nothing to take a Hamming distance to. NEW descriptor measuring how DEEP into the parse the W vs L corpus reaches.

metric_definitions.w_depth: median structural depth reached by the vpc-RESOLVING (W) seed set = count of nested/chained structural tokens on the gate's parse path (e.g. completed second-child element, namespace declaration, internal-subset bracket nesting) per seed
metric_definitions.l_depth: same statistic over the cmplog/naive-BLOCKING (L) seed set
metric_definitions.depth_lift: w_depth / l_depth (>1 => W corpus reaches a structurally deeper parse state than L)

depth_token_per_branch.libxml2_6654: two-child content group (both cur and last non-NULL)
depth_token_per_branch.libxml2_7451: namespaced element with matched xmlns prefix binding (prefix==pref)
depth_token_per_branch.libxml2_7459: namespace-resolution path with non-NULL URI binding

hypotheses.prediction: W seeds reach a structurally DEEPER parse state than L seeds (depth_lift > 1, w_depth meaningfully above l_depth), because the gradient banked credit on each chained comparison to climb the multi-token structure. This is DISCRIMINATING: the competing 'literal-token climb' alternative (sibling hypothesis) predicts a fixed-distance byte signature and NO depth difference (l seeds already at the same structural depth, just one literal short); observing a depth lift with NO scoreable single literal rules the literal-climb explanation out and confirms a structural-assembly mechanism. It is also INDEPENDENT of the resolve pattern (G2): parse depth is a property of the seed bytes, not of which fuzzer saved them.

data_realities_respected: Neither descriptor uses seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence — value_profile is a FEEDBACK invisible in mutation_op, so its effect is measured via what the corpus REACHES (Hamming-distance-to-literal / parse depth), never via a lineage 'gradient event'.

value_distance_reached is applied ONLY to the literal-token hypothesis whose gates carry a concrete operand_literal; the structural hypothesis (operand_literal=null, none_structural) uses depth_reach instead, per the data_reality that different-sized W/L seeds break byte-alignment on assembly gates.

Both descriptors are seed_set-sourced. DB audit: of the 15 branches, ONLY sqlite3_14233 and sqlite3_14786 have resolving_seeds+blocking_seeds (W=10/L=10 each) in db/blockers.sqlite; libpng_3999 and all 11 libxml2 branches have ZERO W/L seeds. Per the corpus-availability data_reality (on-disk corpora exist only for curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3), only the 2 sqlite3 branches are actually MEASURABLE.
notes: COLLAPSE DECISION: kept the 2 prior subtypes SEPARATE rather than merged, because they require DIFFERENT descriptors and the contract permits keeping separate exactly when one needs value_distance and the other depth_reach. (1) vp_gradient_value_distance_climb (9 branches, ex-vp_gradient_literal_token_climb) climbs toward a CONCRETE operand_literal (0x03, 'xml:id', 'ID', 'ANY', 'N', ';', 'xmlns', '0x') -> measurable by Hamming distance to that literal. (2) vp_gradient_structural_depth_assembly (5 branches, ex-vp_gradient_structural_path_assembly) has operand_literal=null / operand_kind=none_structural|derived_integer (runtime-interned pointer identity, accumulated parse-state, multi-child content model) -> NO literal to distance against, only parse depth discriminates. No real-data measurement can collapse them: value_distance_reached is undefined for the structural set; depth_reach would be degenerate for single-literal gates. Membership: the libxml2_6649_h0 / 6654 / 7352 / 7451 / 7459 branches are the structural set (their cards confirm last/cur pointer non-NULL, inSubset==1, prefix==pref pointer identity, URI!=NULL ns-resolution); everything else is literal-token. FEASIBILITY CAVEAT (load-bearing): both descriptors are NEW (registry_tool null) AND seed-dependent, but only the 2 sqlite3 literal-token branches (14233, 14786) have seeds in the DB. Consequence: vp_gradient_value_distance_climb can be measured on its 2 sqlite3 members only; the 7 libpng/libxml2 literal members and ALL 5 structural members are seed-starved and fall to fallback=inconclusive at arbitration time unless seeds are bisected for them first (tools/seed_bisect.py + per_role_coverage on the libxml2/libpng reps). vp_gradient_structural_depth_assembly currently has ZERO scoreable members and is authored on the strength of the card evidence, not measurable now. UNBUILT TOOLS: both value_distance_reached and depth_reach descriptors are in the registry descriptor_vocabulary 'compute' list but have NO tool implemented under bench/tools/ (only joint_necessity.py exists) -> orchestrator must build them before arbitration. TARGETS: literal hypothesis spans libpng+libxml2+sqlite3 (corpus only on sqlite3); structural hypothesis spans libxml2 only (no corpus).
